creator: shelton@granch.ru
text:
LLazarte@mat.unb.br wrote:

> After booting kern.flp and mfsroot.flp, selecting and configuring
> devices, the system freezes while on the "blue screen", with the
> message "probing ... this can take a while". It takes forever.
> 

Also. I see it when I install FreeBSD on some old computer (DX2-66,16M
RAM, 540 HDD Maxtor, VESA Cirrus Logic Videocard). I probed 2.2.5, 2.2.6
and 2.2.7 versions and all it freezed at this place. Install was
happened only when I change HDD to 1Gb Western Digital. Network card was
some old NE2000-compatible card with jumpers.

-- 
     With Best Regards.
     Rashid N. Achilov (RNA1-RIPE), Granch Ltd. lead engineer
     e-mail: achilov@granch.ru, tel (383-2) 24-2363
